chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-72 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE PRIORITY. 1. FOR ORDERS ON CMA NO.17115 OF 2025. 2. FOR HEARING OF CMA NO.349 OF 2025. 3. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. 22.08.2025 Mr. Imtiaz Ali, Advocate for the Petitioners. Ms. Zahrah Sehr Vayani, Assistant Attorney General for Pakistan Mr. Mehran Khan Mehar, Assistant A.G. --------------------- 1. Urgency granted. Statements of Respondent Nos.2 and 3/RHO NADRA, Karachi, already available on record, wherein, it is mentioned that the Petitioners to approach either DLC East or V&R Branch, located at Awami Markaz, Shahrah-e-Faisal, Karachi, along with all necessary and supporting original documents. Learned counsel for the Petitioners under instructions does not press the instant Petition and will approach the above Committee for redressal of their grievance, therefore, the same is dismissed as not pressed. The Committees are directed to decide the case of Petitioners within one month as soon as they approach. JUDGE JUDGE Jamil
